bf3abf5b6f72.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
bf3abf5b6f72.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
bf3abf5b6f72.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

5329de6dd05d.title: Renew formal trust proof before it becomes a visible drag
5329de6dd05d.description: Last inspected 11.1 years ago. A stale inspection date erodes trust scoring and signals to customers that compliance isn't actively managed. Request a voluntary re-inspection once you're confident of a strong result.
5329de6dd05d.expected_upside: Fresh compliance proof, trust signal renewal
5329de6dd05d.management_implication: Stale trust is a hidden ceiling on your overall position.

ef5e6c27ec99.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
ef5e6c27ec99.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

beae20181c12.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
beae20181c12.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
beae20181c12.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

39c195cdd00f.title: Guest experience outpaces formal trust record
39c195cdd00f.description: Guests enjoy the venue but the compliance record hasn't kept up. One poor inspection would make a private gap public. The fix is proactive compliance work, not more marketing.
39c195cdd00f.expected_upside: Close the gap before it becomes visible

2b912d8b67f0.title: Protect the 4.6/5 rating — it took years to build
2b912d8b67f0.description: With 303 reviews at 4.6/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
